events.description: Join us in Mumbai for an exciting ClickHouse meetup bringing together engineers, architects, and data leaders to explore how modern teams are tackling the next frontier of
events.location_detail: 7th Floor, Skyline Icon, Andheri - Kurla Rd, Chimatpada, Marol, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400059, Mumbai
events.about: Hosted by ClickHouse and Siddhant A. ClickHouse is a Super Organizer Saturday, May 30 · 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM IST Awfis Skyline Icon 1 7th Floor, Skyline Icon, Andheri - Kurla Rd, Chimatpada, Marol, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400059 · Mumbai Hosted by ClickHouse and Siddhant A. ClickHouse is a Super Organizer Join us in Mumbai for an exciting ClickHouse meetup bringing together engineers, architects, and data leaders to explore how modern teams are tackling the next frontier of AI-powered analytics. From agentic workloads and semantic data interfaces to real-time pipelines and production migrations, speakers will share hands-on lessons from building high-performance systems with ClickHouse and in the world of Agentic AI. Connect with the local data community and discover what it really takes to make AI and analytics work together at scale. Don't miss out! RSVP and secure your spot! 🗓️ Agenda: 10:00 AM: Registration & networking 11:00 AM: Welcome & opening 11:10 AM: Talk 1 - Pushdown or pay up: predicate pushdown in pg_clickhouse by Indranil Chandra, Architect - ML & Data Engineer, Upstox 11:40 PM: Talk 2 - From Prompt to PASS/FAIL: Production LLM Certification on Langfuse +

events.title: Product Management Meetup, Sat, Jun 20, 2026, 11:00 AM   | Meetup
events.description: Join us for a special edition where Mumbai will be celebrating the people behind the products - the thinkers, builders, designers, innovators, and problem solvers shaping t
events.location_detail: Next to Hotel Courtyard Marriot, Andheri Kurla Road, Andheri East, Mumbai
events.about: Hosted by LoveKshitij S. and Hitesh S. Saturday, Jun 20 · 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM IST B Wing Terrace, Atrium 215, Next to Hotel Courtyard Marriot, Andheri Kurla Road, Andheri East · Mumbai Hosted by LoveKshitij S. and Hitesh S. Join us for a special edition where Mumbai will be celebrating the people behind the products - the thinkers, builders, designers, innovators, and problem solvers shaping the future of technology and business. ProductTank is the world’s largest product management meetup community with events in more than 155 cities globally and a thriving network of 300,000+ members. Founded in London in 2010, ProductTank brings together passionate professionals to share knowledge, insights, and experiences from the world of product building. ProductTank Mumbai features engaging conversations and networking opportunities around Product Management, Product Design, UI/UX, Technology, AI, and Business. ✨ This edition features a panel discussion on AI Product Management — exploring how AI is transforming product strategy, user experience, decision-making, and innovation. 👥 Who should attend? • Product Managers • Product Marketers • Product Designers • CEOs & Founders • Startup Enth

The meetup is mainly centred around the pivotal role played by SAFe in transforming organizations worldwide. It entails a few critical determinants
events.location_detail: Near Domestic Airport, Plot No. 2087, Nehru Road Extn, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai, Mumbai, CO
events.about: Hosted by Divya S. Saturday, Jun 27 · 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM MDT Every 4th Saturday of the month Hotel Bawa International Near Domestic Airport, Plot No. 2087, Nehru Road Extn, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai · Mumbai Scaled Agile, Inc. runs this Meetup Group. Hosted by Divya S. Join our free meetup !! The meetup is mainly centred around the pivotal role played by SAFe in transforming organizations worldwide. It entails a few critical determinants for a project’s success such as faster time-to-market, boosting employee morale, high-quality deliverables, and improved productivity. Typically, the above factors are measured in terms of the organization’s business objectives to understand the best ways to integrate SAFe® into the framework of the organization. Organization-wide transformation to SAFe® follows an iterative path, refining the existing processes and reusing the existing investments. Scaled Agile, Inc. runs this Meetup Group.
